Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NICHOLAS BULLION'S Hearing For Stay And Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandamus is off calendar. On February 13, 2014, the petition was dismissed with prejudice. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

Notice Of Hearing For Stay And Petition For Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Continued To Jan-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NICHOLAS BULLION'S Hearing For Stay And Petition For Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandamus IS Continued to January 28, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 7, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The Court also does not have the Administrative Record that was lodged on December 30, 2013. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
